questionHtml: State whether P is a local maximum or a local minimum and whether it is above or below the x-axis.
markschemeHtml:
(P) is a (local) maximum (point) and is above (the x-axis)                    A1

[1 mark]

meta.title: State whether P is a local maximum or a local minimum and whether it is above or below the x-axis.
